system: Air-handling unit supply-air-temperature control with economizer

input.spec_excerpt: Each air-handling unit shall maintain supply-air temperature at setpoint and use outdoor air for free cooling when conditions allow.
input.soo_excerpt: In occupied mode the AHU modulates the cooling-coil valve and economizer dampers in sequence to hold supply-air temperature at setpoint. When outdoor-air temperature is below the changeover limit, the economizer dampers modulate first for free cooling before the cooling coil is used; above the limit the dampers go to minimum outdoor-air position.

must_cover: what to record (BMS trend and field instrument)
pass/fail acceptance tied to the SOO
expected_points: verify economizer modulates to hold supply-air temperature in free-cooling mode
verify changeover to minimum outdoor air above the changeover limit
record supply-air temperature, outdoor-air temperature, damper position, cooling-coil valve position
confirm economizer and mechanical cooling do not fight each other
compare measured response against the sequence setpoints

system: Chilled-water plant staging on reduced cooling load

input.spec_excerpt: The chilled-water plant shall stage chillers and pumps to meet building cooling load while maintaining differential pressure and supply-water temperature.
input.soo_excerpt: Chillers and associated pumps stage on and off based on cooling load and plant differential pressure. As load falls, the plant sheds a chiller and adjusts pump speed to hold the differential-pressure setpoint; supply-water temperature is maintained at setpoint with reset as scheduled.

must_cover: what to record (BMS trend and field instrument)
pass/fail acceptance tied to the SOO
expected_points: establish a near-full-load initial state with chillers running
induce a load drop by reducing coil demand
record chiller staging, pump speed and flow, differential pressure, supply and return water temperature
verify a chiller stages off and pumps adjust to hold differential pressure
compare staging behaviour against the sequence

reference_pointer: 04-functional-test-library.md (chilled-water plant); 10-sequences-of-operation.md (CHW plant staging and DP reset)

system: Standby generator start and load transfer on loss of utility

input.spec_excerpt: On loss of normal utility power, standby generators shall start and accept building load within the required time.
input.soo_excerpt: Loss of utility is sensed; the generator receives a start signal and runs up to rated voltage and frequency. Once stable, the automatic transfer switch transfers load from the utility source to the generator within the specified interval, and re-transfers in an orderly manner when utility power returns.

must_cover: what to record (BMS trend and field instrument)
pass/fail acceptance tied to the SOO
expected_points: simulate loss of utility and verify the generator start signal
record generator start time and voltage/frequency stabilization
verify the automatic transfer switch transfers load within the required interval
confirm orderly re-transfer and generator cooldown on utility return
compare measured timings against the design/sequence values

reference_pointer: 04-functional-test-library.md (generator; ATS); 10-sequences-of-operation.md (generator start on utility loss; ATS transfer)

system: UPS battery ride-through on loss of input power

input.spec_excerpt: The UPS shall support the critical load without interruption during a loss of input power for at least the rated battery autonomy.
input.soo_excerpt: On loss of UPS input power, the UPS carries the critical load from stored energy without a break in output, then returns to normal and recharges the battery when input power is restored.

must_cover: what to record (BMS trend and field instrument)
pass/fail acceptance tied to the SOO
expected_points: verify no interruption to the critical load on loss of input power
record the transfer to battery, output-voltage continuity, and battery autonomy
verify return to normal operation and battery recharge on input restoration
confirm alarms annunciate correctly
compare measured autonomy against the rated value and the sequence

input.spec_excerpt: The facility shall ride through a complete loss of utility power with no interruption to the critical IT load and restore mechanical cooling on generator power.
input.soo_excerpt: On loss of utility, the UPS carries the critical load while generators start and the transfer switches move load to generator power; mechanical cooling restarts on generator power and recovers space conditions before UPS battery autonomy is exhausted.

must_cover: what to record (BMS trend and field instrument)
pass/fail acceptance tied to the SOO
expected_points: coordinate a simulated full utility failure across both power and cooling systems
verify UPS ride-through holds the critical load continuously
verify generators start and load transfers within the required time
verify cooling restarts on generator power and recovers space temperature before battery autonomy is exhausted
record the end-to-end timeline and compare against the design
